playbook.intent: 1K free newsletter readers → 200 paying customers at $20 average ($4K MRR).
playbook.scope: Engineer a documented funnel that turns a 1K-subscriber free newsletter into roughly 200 paying customers at $20 average through low-friction email-driven conversion, hitting $4K MRR with no paid traffic.

success-criteria.criterion: Documented funnel stages with conversion rates per stage
Onboarding sequence active for new subscribers
≥200 paying customers and ≥$4K MRR within 90 days

stage.name: Audit
stage.intent: Know which issues, segments, and CTAs already convert.

tasks.task: Pull last 90 days of opens, clicks, and replies by issue
Tag every CTA by intent and outcome

stage.decision-gate: Advance when CTA performance has been segmented and ranked.

stage.name: Offer
stage.intent: A paid offer tied to the top-converting topic.

tasks.task: Define the paid product framing (job + price + format)
Write the offer page with proof and pricing
Pick a single pricing hypothesis ($X for Y format)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 3 readers describe the offer back unaided.

stage.name: Drip
stage.intent: An onboarding sequence makes the first paid pitch.

tasks.task: Write a 5-email onboarding sequence ending in CTA
Insert in-issue ads in regular sends
Tag click-to-CTA users for a follow-up nudge

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 3 paid customers from the drip have closed.

stage.name: Convert
stage.intent: Run paid pushes that respect the list.

tasks.task: Monthly soft promo woven into normal issues

stage.decision-gate: Advance when conversion rate stabilises ≥2% per push.

stage.name: Retain
stage.intent: Keep buyers paying month over month.

tasks.task: Trigger churn-save sequence on cancel intent
Quarterly OKR review of LTV, churn, and ARPU

stage.decision-gate: Maintain only if 90-day churn ≤5%; otherwise re-spec offer.

extra.value: [Cold acquisition — funnel uses existing list only, Enterprise sales — single-seat self-serve, Free-forever model — explicit paid conversion]
[Newsletter with ≥1000 active subscribers (open rate ≥30%), A paid product or service tier ready to charge]
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content newsletter-to-paid-funnel-1k-to-200 --format md, agent: faion get-content newsletter-to-paid-funnel-1k-to-200 --format context, json: faion get-content newsletter-to-paid-funnel-1k-to-200 --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
